languages.text: {n}Некоторое время магос молчит — о том, что он рядом, напоминает лишь гул металлического тела. Затем Экзальт-117 вздыхает, тяжело и устало.{/n} "Если нет другого пути, я принимаю эту точку отсчета".

{n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."
languages.original_text: {n}Некоторое время магос молчит — о том, что он рядом, напоминает лишь гул металлического тела. Затем Экзальт-117 вздыхает, тяжело и устало.{/n} "Если нет другого пути, я принимаю эту точку отсчета".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

{n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

{n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

languages.text: {n}贤者沉默了一会儿，只有他金属躯体的嗡鸣声提醒着你他的存在。随后，他沉重而疲惫地叹了口气。{/n}“若别无选择，我接受这个基准点。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}贤者沉默了一会儿，只有他金属躯体的嗡鸣声提醒着你他的存在。随后，他沉重而疲惫地叹了口气。{/n}“若别无选择，我接受这个基准点。”

languages.text: {n}Le magos réfléchit longuement avant de répondre. Sans le bourdonnement de son corps métallique, vous pourriez presque oublier qu'il se tient devant vous. Il finit par pousser un long soupir de résignation.{/n} « S'il n'existe pas d'autre solution, j'accepte ce point de référence. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le magos réfléchit longuement avant de répondre. Sans le bourdonnement de son corps métallique, vous pourriez presque oublier qu'il se tient devant vous. Il finit par pousser un long soupir de résignation.{/n} « S'il n'existe pas d'autre solution, j'accepte ce point de référence. »

languages.text: {n}Magos, bir süre hiçbir şey söylemiyor. Metal vücudunun uğultusu haricinde çıt çıkmıyor. Sonrasında ağır ve yorgun bir şekilde iç çekiyor.{/n} "Madem başka yol yok, o hâlde bu referans noktasını kabul ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}Magos, bir süre hiçbir şey söylemiyor. Metal vücudunun uğultusu haricinde çıt çıkmıyor. Sonrasında ağır ve yorgun bir şekilde iç çekiyor.{/n} "Madem başka yol yok, o hâlde bu referans noktasını kabul ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}El magos no responde durante un tiempo, hasta el punto de que el zumbido de su cuerpo metálico es el único recordatorio de su presencia. Después suspira con pesadez, cansado.{/n} «Si no hay otra opción, acepto este punto de referencia».
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}El magos no responde durante un tiempo, hasta el punto de que el zumbido de su cuerpo metálico es el único recordatorio de su presencia. Después suspira con pesadez, cansado.{/n} «Si no hay otra opción, acepto este punto de referencia».

languages.text: {n}Der Magos schweigt eine Weile und allein das Summen seines metallenen Körpers erinnert an seine Anwesenheit. Schließlich seufzt er schwer und müde.{/n} "Wenn es keinen anderen Weg gibt, akzeptiere ich diesen Referenzpunkt."
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Magos schweigt eine Weile und allein das Summen seines metallenen Körpers erinnert an seine Anwesenheit. Schließlich seufzt er schwer und müde.{/n} "Wenn es keinen anderen Weg gibt, akzeptiere ich diesen Referenzpunkt."

languages.text: {n}マゴスはしばらく沈黙し、金属製の身体から発せられる唸り声だけが彼の存在を告げる。そして彼は深く、疲れたようにため息をつく。{/n}「他に道がないのなら、この基準を受け入れる」
languages.original_text: {n}The Magos says nothing for a time, the hum of his metal body the only reminder of his presence. Then he sighs, heavily and wearily.{/n} "If there is no other way, I accept this point of reference."

traits.locale_text: {n}マゴスはしばらく沈黙し、金属製の身体から発せられる唸り声だけが彼の存在を告げる。そして彼は深く、疲れたようにため息をつく。{/n}「他に道がないのなら、この基準を受け入れる」
